Simple Pricing

Choose Your Perfect Plan

Start free and upgrade as you grow. All plans include our AI-powered scoring engine.

All prices in USD

Free

Perfect for getting started

$0
  • 1 comprehensive assessment
  • Basic CEFR level result
  • Skill breakdown scores
  • Watermarked certificate
  • AI-powered feedback
  • Downloadable PDF certificate
  • Progress tracking

Single Test

Full assessment with detailed report

$12.99/ one-time
  • Complete 6-skill assessment
  • Detailed CEFR score
  • AI-powered feedback
  • Downloadable PDF certificate
  • Progress tracking
  • Priority AI analysis
  • Email support
Most Popular

Premium Pack

Best value for serious learners

$29.99/ 3 tests
  • 3 full assessments
  • Progress tracking dashboard
  • Priority AI analysis
  • Unlimited certificate downloads
  • Email support
  • Peer comparison
  • Full analytics suite

Pro Pack

Complete learning solution

$49.99/ 6 tests
  • 6 assessments
  • Full analytics suite
  • Detailed skill improvement tips
  • Comparison with peers
  • Priority support
  • Unlimited certificate downloads
  • Progress tracking dashboard
Secure payment powered by PayPal·All prices in USD
For Organizations

Scale English Testing Across Your Team

Purpose-built plans for schools, businesses, and institutions — with the tools your team actually needs.

Team

Up to 5 users

Perfect for small schools & tutors

$49/month
  • Up to 5 team members
  • Group dashboard & analytics
  • Export all student results as CSV
  • Shared question bank access
  • Email support

Best for: Small schools, tutors, study groups

Business

Up to 25 users

For language schools & test centers

$199/month
  • Up to 25 team members
  • White-label certificates (your logo)
  • API access for results
  • Custom question bank upload
  • Bulk user import via CSV
  • Priority support

Best for: Language schools, test prep centers

Enterprise

Unlimited users

For universities, corporations & government

Custom
  • Unlimited users & assessments
  • SSO (Google, Microsoft, Okta)
  • Dedicated account manager
  • SLA guarantee
  • On-premise or dedicated cloud
  • Custom feature development

Best for: Universities, corporations, government

Learn more about Team & Business plans·Enterprise solutions
